entity.summary: Base decentralized exchange and token-market application with a live first-party trading interface, recently updated spot markets, and material current trading volume.
entity.notes: The first-party trading application remains reachable and presents active token discovery and trading surfaces. Current exchange data reports four coins, five pairs, recently updated markets, and approximately $62,000 in 24-hour volume. HEI therefore classifies Baseline (Base) as active.

evidence.title: Baseline official trading application
evidence.notes: The current first-party application remains reachable and exposes token discovery and trading functions.

evidence.title: Baseline Base exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current exchange data reports four coins, five pairs, recently updated spot markets, and material non-zero 24-hour volume.

evidence.title: Baseline Base exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange discovery data preserves the Baseline Base identity, API ID, and app.baseline.markets domain.
